CREATE TABLE `base_projectinfo_responsible_user` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `projectinfo_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `users_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `api_projectinfo_responsi_projectinfo_id_users_id_43cbb8f9_uniq` (`projectinfo_id`,`users_id`),
  KEY `api_projectinfo_responsible_user_projectinfo_id_8516afc8` (`projectinfo_id`),
  KEY `api_projectinfo_responsible_user_users_id_82cdcbbc` (`users_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
